name: computer-use-for-windows
description: A local Codex plugin that exposes Windows desktop automation tools over MCP.

scripts.check: node --check ./scripts/mcp-server.js && node --check ./scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node --check ./scripts/doctor-smoke-test.mjs && node --check ./scripts/backend-smoke-test.mjs && node --check ./scripts/input-smoke-test.mjs && node --check ./scripts/mouse-smoke-test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke:doctor && npm run smoke && npm run smoke:backend && npm run smoke:input && npm run smoke:mouse
